text:
Please add the following HTML to this page: http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult.html And then please contact wolfram@gmail.com when done...that is, if this ticket tracker doesn't already automatically notify the ticket creator when it's closed. Fix:
BSD Dedicated Server Hosting
ServePath offers the latest version of FreeBSD on any of our dedicated servers. All ServePath FreeBSD dedicated servers come with root access to install additional UNIX applications and allow you to customize your FreeBSD dedicated server to fit your needs.
How-To-Repeat: HTML to add below in next field:
